name: Artful, Stuck in a Wall...AGAIN?
description:
I haven't even played artful BUT I have gone against him in LMS with banana gun! (AND WON!)

it was a peak game trust me (He's 5'8)

but uh sorry for taking so long to make these things, i'm just not there ALL the time, y'know?

anyways there might be a female one coming out too so if you don't like femboys, which your crazy, your still in luck
